title: Citrusy Silky Lemon Salad
description: A citrusy and silky lemon salad featuring unwaxed lemons, toasted almonds, and paleo-friendly ingredients that is a crowd-pleaser for lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 unwaxed lemon
ingredients.notes: Choose lemons with yellow rinds and green flesh. Avoid wax.

ingredients.name: 1 bunch microgreens (such as arugula or rocket)

instructions: Juice the lemon and set it aside.
In a bowl, combine the lemon juice with the zest, olive oil, salt, and eggs. Mix well until smooth.
Add the softened butter into the egg mixture and mix until fully incorporated. Let it sit for 30 minutes.

Preheat your oven to 150°C (300°F). Place almonds in a shallow baking dish and toast them for about 7-8 minutes, or until fragrant and lightly golden. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before crushing into fine crumbs with the back of a fork.
Fold the cooled almond crumb into the egg mixture and gently stir to combine.
Divide the microgreens among four serving plates. Spoon the lemon salad over the greens, adding some crushed almonds as a garnish if desired.
